checks.description: Cipher is on the approved list
Configured key rotation cadence is quarterly or better
Most recent key rotation happened within the cadence window, measured at snapshot time
The store exposes no public endpoints

description: Compiled from RIA briefing 2026-14012, remediation action A4. Encryption must be on, the algorithm on the approved list, the rotation cadence within a quarter, and the last rotation recent relative to the snapshot instant -- a cadence policy nobody executes does not satisfy the control.
title: Patient records store is encrypted at rest with quarterly key rotation
